_doc: Files/paths that must never (or only partially) enter agent context. Hooks use this at PreToolUse to block; proxy middleware uses it as a backstop for tool_result truncation. Patterns are relative to PROJECT_ROOT and use bash case-style globs.

paginated_paths.reason: 28MB transcript — tail only; use offset to walk back
debug log — tail only unless offset is set
pipeline summary — use offset to walk sections

_soft_size_doc: Any Read on a file larger than this without an offset+limit pair triggers a warning-and-truncate in the proxy middleware.
